title: Fix accentcard and cleancard Quran display modes to auto-fit like fullcard
description: Add autoFitToTwoLines pre-measurement to renderAccentCard so text is never clipped. Pre-compute font sizes using full text before starting typewriter animation, then apply those sizes during typing.
acceptance_criteria: accentcard mode auto-shrinks font for long ayat (no text clipping)
cleancard mode auto-shrinks font for long ayat (no text clipping)
typewriter animation still works with cursor
card size accommodates full text without overflow
reserveQuranSpace is called to properly allocate height
